name: ivy-revealed
prompt: Medium-wide shot young woman seated among dense tropical plants in greenhouse. Emerald green wavy hair, golden eyes watching with lazy confidence. Casual academy uniform, relaxed posture. Botanical expert in her element. Vine patterns on arm visible. Plants surrounding her like old friends. Greenhouse glass walls behind showing night sky, green mist from plants around her. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, green color palette, high contrast, cel shading

name: heat-burns-it
